text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English, the podcast where we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn.
zh: 大家好，欢迎收听《Real Easy English》，这是一档用简单英语进行真实对话、帮助大家学习的播客节目。

text: I'm Georgie. And I'm Neil. And don't forget that this podcast is now available as a video on our website,
zh: 我是Georgie。我是Neil。别忘了，这档播客现在也能在我们的网站上以视频形式观看，

text: so you can watch us at bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 你可以在bbclearningenglish.com上看到我们。

text: Hi Neil, how are you today? Hi, Georgie. I'm very well.
zh: 嗨，Neil，你今天怎么样？嗨，Georgie，我很好。

text: Actually, I'm really happy today because the sun is shining and it's warm
zh: 其实我今天特别开心，因为阳光明媚，天气很暖和，

text: and it seems like it's been a long time since we had such nice sunny weather.
zh: 感觉已经好久没有这么晴朗宜人的天气了。

text: I know. The changing of the seasons is so wonderful.
zh: 是啊，季节更替真的很美妙。

text: And actually, that's what we're talking about Today we're going to talk about the seasons and the different types of weather we get in the UK.
zh: 这正是我们今天要聊的话题：季节，以及英国不同类型的天气。

text: Yes. So in the UK, our seasons are roughly like this.
zh: 对，在英国，我们的季节大致是这样划分的。

text: So March, April, May, those are the spring seasons.
zh: 三月、四月、五月是春季。

text: Then we move into summer, which is June, July and August.
zh: 接下来是夏季，也就是六月、七月和八月。

text: Autumn, that's September, October, November.
zh: 秋季是九月、十月、十一月。

text: And then we're into winter for December, January, February.
zh: 然后就是冬季，十二月、一月、二月。

text: Yeah, more or less, approximately. So Neil, what is your favourite season?
zh: 对，大致上是这样，差不多。那Neil，你最喜欢哪个季节？

text: Well, you can probably guess because I'm so happy that it's spring and summer combined.
zh: 你大概能猜到，因为我这么开心，肯定是春夏交替的时候。

text: So anything with long late nights and evenings, I love.
zh: 只要是那种夜晚和傍晚天色晚才黑的日子，我都喜欢。

text: What else is good about summer? In the summer, you can be outside.
zh: 夏天还有什么好的呢？夏天你可以待在户外。

text: You can go swimming in the sea.
zh: 你可以去海里游泳。

text: You can stay up late and you have wonderful light in the UK.
zh: 你可以熬夜晚睡，而且英国夏天的光线特别美。

text: What's your favourite season then, Georgie? Well, I'm a big fan of the seasons, the transition seasons.
zh: 那你最喜欢哪个季节呢，Georgie？我特别喜欢过渡季节。

text: So I really like spring and autumn, especially spring.
zh: 所以我很喜欢春天和秋天，尤其是春天。

text: Right now we're in spring in the UK and you can see everyone
zh: 现在英国正值春天，你能看到每个人

text: looking happier because we've had a really long, hard, dark, cold winter
zh: 看起来都更开心了，因为我们经历了一个漫长、艰难、阴暗、寒冷的冬天，

text: and everyone is smiling now because they there are blossoms on the trees
zh: 现在大家都在微笑，因为树上开满了花，

text: which make me so happy I love seeing pink blossoms on the trees
zh: 这让我特别开心，我喜欢看树上粉色的花朵，

text: um the days are warmer and that yeah there's this sense of a transition
zh: 天气也变暖了，那种一切都在转变的感觉真好，

text: um same with Autumn although you're leaving the summer months um
zh: 秋天也是一样，虽然那时夏天已经过去了，

text: I really love the colors on the trees as well
zh: 但我也非常喜欢秋天树叶的颜色，

text: um especially those cooler crisp days
zh: 尤其是那种凉爽清新的日子，

text: when the sky is blue and the leaves are orange and brown i love that
zh: 天空湛蓝、树叶橙黄褐红的时候，我特别喜欢。

text: wow you're making me look forward to autumn and it's not even summer yet is there a season that you don't like i
zh: 哇，你都让我开始期待秋天了，可现在夏天都还没到呢。那有没有你不喜欢的季节？

text: do like all the seasons um i like to have balance So I wouldn't like to have summer all year round.
zh: 我其实所有季节都喜欢，我喜欢那种平衡感，所以我不希望一年到头都是夏天。

text: But I think winter is my least favourite because of the dark days.
zh: 不过我觉得冬天是我最不喜欢的季节，因为白天太短太黑暗了。

text: In the UK, I think it's particularly hard because
zh: 我觉得在英国这一点尤其明显，

text: especially January and February, it's really cold.
zh: 尤其是一月和二月，真的特别冷。

text: And there's nothing really to get us through the sad times.
zh: 而且几乎没有什么能帮我们熬过那些难熬的日子。

text: I know exactly what you mean. There are good things about winter, but mostly it's just difficult, isn't it?
zh: 我完全明白你的意思。冬天也有好的一面，但大多数时候确实挺难熬的，对吧？

text: I agree. It's the dark. I can't stand it. Yeah.
zh: 我同意。就是那种黑暗，我受不了。是啊。

text: So, as I said, I quite like having the balance of different seasons throughout the year.
zh: 所以就像我说的，我挺喜欢一年四季都有变化、保持平衡。

text: I like to have transitions and changes. What about you, Neil? How do you feel about that?
zh: 我喜欢有过渡、有变化。那你呢，Neil？你怎么看？

text: Yeah, I think I agree. I mean, it would be nice to have a shorter winter, winter but
zh: 是啊，我也同意。虽然冬天短一点会更好，不过

text: I think I would still prefer to have different seasons because like I said I really like the
zh: 我觉得我还是更喜欢四季分明，因为就像我说的，我真的很喜欢

text: late light evenings in the summer and I think even though I hate the dark winters
zh: 夏天那种天黑得晚的傍晚，而且尽管我讨厌冬天的黑暗，

text: I would really miss that if the weather was nice all year but got dark at the same time like at six or seven 11 o 'clock.
zh: 如果天气一直很好，但同样在六七点就天黑了，我肯定也会很想念那种感觉。

text: OK, let's recap the language we heard in the conversation. We learned different ways to talk about the seasons.
zh: 好，我们来回顾一下对话中出现的表达。我们学到了几种谈论季节的方式。

text: For example, looking forward to – that means you're excited for something to happen in the future.
zh: 比如，looking forward to——意思是你对将来要发生的事感到期待和兴奋。

text: That's right. So, I'm really looking forward to the warm, light, sunny evenings in the summer.
zh: 没错。比如，我非常期待夏天那种温暖、明亮、阳光灿烂的傍晚。

text: We heard to be a big fan of. That means that you really like something.
zh: 我们还听到了to be a big fan of，意思是你非常喜欢某样东西。

text: For example, I'm a big fan of spring and autumn.
zh: 比如，我很喜欢春天和秋天。

text: Yes, Georgie's a big fan of the transition seasons. I'm not such a big fan of winter, though.
zh: 是的，Georgie特别喜欢过渡季节。不过我倒不太喜欢冬天。

text: Actually, I can't stand it, which means that I really hate it. Thanks for listening to Real Easy English.
zh: 其实，我是can't stand it，意思是我真的很讨厌它。感谢收听《Real Easy English》。

text: We've talked about the seasons in the UK, but the seasons are different all around the world. What are the seasons like where you live?
zh: 我们聊了英国的四季，但世界各地的季节各不相同。你所在的地方，季节是什么样的呢？

text: Email us at learningenglish at bbc .co .uk. We always like to hear from you. Goodbye. Bye.
zh: 欢迎发邮件至 learningenglish@bbc.co.uk，我们很乐意听到你的想法。再见。拜拜。
